name: test-server-messages
description: Broadcast scheduled server announcements with sequential or weighted shuffle-bag rotation.

messages.description: Messages to broadcast. Empty arrays are allowed and cause the cronjob to exit quietly.

text.description: Exact message text to broadcast. Supports {playerCount} and {serverName} placeholders.

weight.description: Relative weight used only when order is set to random.

interval.description: Cron expression for the announcement schedule. The cronjob is defined with the same default expression for this module version.

order.description: Message rotation strategy. Random uses a weighted shuffle-bag.

broadcast-messages.description: Broadcast the next configured server message to all connected players.
